ba_completion_hook: api/business-assessment/start.js after assessment, profile index, job, and indexes persist
subscription_hook_future: api/stripe/webhook.js after saveAccessGrant and active subscription state persistence; not wired in V1
custom_field_strategy: fetch by location, case/whitespace-normalized name match, create only missing contact fields, cache IDs per warm invocation; Profile ID field mandatory
tag_strategy: fetch by location, case/whitespace-normalized match, create only missing required tags, cache per warm invocation, never remove existing tags
unresolved_blockers: GHL Private Integration contact readback returned HTTP 403; production contact fields, tags, matching count, and duplicate absence could not be independently verified
